acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-WayCa SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The WayCa team is responsible for developing and maintaining some tools which run in the enabling-hardware layer of Kunpeng.. The SIG has 7 core members and maintains 5 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-WayCa SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-WayCa SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at dev@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-WayCa SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-WayCa SIG maintains 5 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-WayCa.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-WayCa SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-WayCa SIG has 3 Maintainers, including: Fred Kimmy, Jenkins Jiang, Yonglong Liu. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
